nasb.text: So God heard their groaning; and God remembered His covenant with Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob.

esv.text: And God heard their groaning, and God remembered his covenant with Abraham, with Isaac, and with Jacob.

cnv.text: 神聽見他們的呼聲，就記念他與亞伯拉罕、以撒、雅各所立的約。

ccb.text: 上帝听见他们的哀声，顾念从前跟亚伯拉罕、以撒、雅各所立的约，
